app_subtitle: Analyze rental property deals and compare investment scenarios.
app_description: Deal Analyzer is a US-focused real estate investing app for quickly underwriting rental properties inside ChatGPT. It can estimate missing inputs, score deals with a BUY / HOLD / PASS recommendation, parse Zillow or Redfin listings, compare multiple properties side by side, and optionally save deals to a signed-in account for later review.

authentication.notes: Core read-only tools work without a signed-in account in production. Saved-deal features require sign-in.

tool_justifications.name: analyzeDeal
tool_justifications.title: Analyze real estate deal
tool_justifications.read_only_justification: This tool performs calculations on user-provided property inputs and returns an underwriting result. It does not persist or modify data.
tool_justifications.open_world_justification: This tool does not call external systems. It computes results from the provided arguments and internal heuristics.
tool_justifications.destructive_justification: This tool does not delete or irreversibly modify any user data.

tool_justifications.name: parseListing
tool_justifications.title: Parse listing
tool_justifications.read_only_justification: This tool extracts listing fields from a URL or pasted listing text and returns structured data without changing any state.
tool_justifications.open_world_justification: When given a Zillow or Redfin URL, this tool fetches public listing content from an external website.
tool_justifications.destructive_justification: This tool does not delete or irreversibly modify any user data.

tool_justifications.name: analyzeListing
tool_justifications.title: Parse and analyze listing
tool_justifications.read_only_justification: This tool parses listing content and runs underwriting on the extracted values. It does not persist or modify data.
tool_justifications.open_world_justification: When given a Zillow or Redfin URL, this tool fetches public listing content from an external website before analyzing it.
tool_justifications.destructive_justification: This tool does not delete or irreversibly modify any user data.

tool_justifications.name: compareDeals
tool_justifications.title: Compare multiple deals
tool_justifications.read_only_justification: This tool ranks multiple hypothetical or user-provided deals and returns a comparison only.
tool_justifications.open_world_justification: This tool compares the provided inputs locally and does not depend on external APIs or public systems.
tool_justifications.destructive_justification: This tool does not delete or irreversibly modify any user data.

tool_justifications.name: saveDeal
tool_justifications.title: Save deal
tool_justifications.read_only_justification: This tool writes a deal and its computed analysis to the signed-in user's account for later retrieval.
tool_justifications.open_world_justification: This tool writes to the app's own persistence layer and does not call third-party APIs.
tool_justifications.destructive_justification: This tool adds a record but does not delete existing data.

tool_justifications.name: getDeals
tool_justifications.title: Get saved deals
tool_justifications.read_only_justification: This tool retrieves deals already saved by the signed-in user and does not modify records.
tool_justifications.open_world_justification: This tool reads from the app's own persistence layer and does not call third-party APIs.
tool_justifications.destructive_justification: This tool does not delete or irreversibly modify any user data.

positive_test_cases.scenario: Analyze a straightforward rental property with user-supplied rent and expenses
positive_test_cases.user_prompt: Use Deal Analyzer to analyze a rental property with price 250000, rent 2200, taxes 2400 per year, insurance 1200 per year, HOA 0, city Phoenix, state AZ.

expected_output.notes: The tool should return a structured underwriting result with score, recommendation, cash flow, and break-even rent.

positive_test_cases.scenario: Analyze a deal when only the purchase price and location are known
positive_test_cases.user_prompt: Analyze a rental deal for a $310,000 single-family home in Tampa, FL. I only know the price and location.

expected_output.notes: The tool should estimate missing rent and expense inputs and mark estimated values in the structured response.

positive_test_cases.scenario: Parse a pasted listing description into structured fields
positive_test_cases.user_prompt: Use Deal Analyzer to parse this listing text: 123 Main St, Columbus, OH 43215. Price: $189,900. Estimated rent: $1,650/month. Taxes: $2,200/year. HOA: $150/month. 2 bed, 1 bath condo.

expected_output.notes: The tool should return structured listing fields extracted from freeform text.

positive_test_cases.scenario: Parse and immediately analyze a pasted listing
positive_test_cases.user_prompt: Analyze this listing: 456 Oak Ave, Indianapolis, IN 46203. Price $210,000. Rent $1,850/month. Taxes $2,400/year. Insurance $1,100/year. 3 bed 2 bath single-family home.

expected_output.notes: The tool should return both the underwriting result and the parsed listing details.

positive_test_cases.scenario: Compare two candidate deals side by side
positive_test_cases.user_prompt: Compare these two rental deals with Deal Analyzer: Deal A price 220000 rent 1900 taxes 2400 insurance 1000 in Cleveland OH; Deal B price 275000 rent 2400 taxes 3100 insurance 1200 in Kansas City MO.

expected_output.notes: The tool should return both deals ranked by score and cash flow.

negative_test_cases.scenario: Prompt is about a different consumer domain
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Book me a hotel in Miami for next weekend.
negative_test_cases.why_it_should_not_trigger: The app only analyzes real estate investment deals and does not handle travel bookings.

negative_test_cases.scenario: Prompt requests deletion, but no MCP delete tool is exposed
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Delete all of my saved deals.
negative_test_cases.why_it_should_not_trigger: The MCP server does not expose a delete tool, so the app should not be selected for this request.

negative_test_cases.scenario: Prompt is general conversation rather than deal analysis
negative_test_cases.why_it_should_not_trigger: The prompt does not request real estate underwriting, listing parsing, or deal comparison.

connection_steps: Add the remote MCP server URL: https://deal-analyzer-mcp-production.up.railway.app/mcp
Verify the domain token served at /.well-known/openai-apps-challenge
Scan tools from the MCP server in production
testing_instructions.reviewer_account_requirements: No reviewer account should be necessary for the five positive test cases above. The saveDeal and getDeals tools require sign-in and should only be tested if separate review credentials are provided.
important_notes: This app is US-focused. Zillow and Redfin parsing is designed for US listing formats.
Core value is in read-only underwriting and comparison. Saved-deal features are optional account features.
Production has been verified to allow unauthenticated read-only MCP access and to expose tool annotations in tools/list.

release_notes: Deal Analyzer v1.0 - Initial release. Features: analyze rental deals, estimate missing underwriting inputs, parse Zillow and Redfin listings, analyze pasted listing text, compare multiple deals side by side, and optionally save deals to a signed-in dashboard.
pre_submit_blockers: Verify in ChatGPT developer mode that tools/list and the five positive test cases behave the same way as the production curl checks.
If you want OpenAI to test saveDeal or getDeals, provide a separate review account that can complete Google OAuth without MFA or additional verification.
sources: Codebase: src/mcp.ts, src/oauth.ts, src/server.ts, public/privacy.html, public/terms.html
